mnemonics: The 4 M's of Measurement: Metrics, Monitoring, Modeling, and Management
keyPoints: Establish baseline metrics for current performance and utilization.
Continuously monitor resource usage against established thresholds.
Use predictive modeling to forecast future capacity needs based on trends.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on peak usage and ignoring average or growth trends.
Measuring too many irrelevant metrics instead of focusing on key performance indicators (KPIs).
